title: Program-level contract layer
notes: Do not promote to opcode; define top-level contract schema and review block first.

title: Interaction model
notes: Document human/AI/CLI ownership and raw-tool-output policy.

title: Process rail definition
notes: Policy layer for deviation/resume/backtracking; no deterministic classifier yet.

title: Conversation semantics
notes: Allowed input classes and routing policies; not a full NL classifier.

title: Hybrid execution model
notes: Clarifies AI driver / CLI validator / human reviewer boundary.

title: Program-level approval gate
notes: Implement as documented gate and validation profile before compiler/IR semantics.

title: Derived artifact synchronization
notes: Use warning/error modes; avoid making every stale doc a blocker.

title: SVG graph artifact standard
notes: Promote provenance/manifest standard only, not renderer implementation.

title: Delta backlog convention
notes: Preserve cross-chat improvement prompts with structured metadata.

title: FLOW.JOIN / SHARED.TAIL.REFERENCE
notes: Do not implement quickly; affects graph/IR/compiler/path enumeration/rendering.

title: Real-module testcase generation mode
notes: Artifact generation is useful; runtime execution/scoring remains out of scope.

title: Two-tier rendering model for output templates
notes: Already partially present; improve guide and validation expectations, not new core runtime.

title: Attribute/value schema documentation standard
notes: Every YAML field needs meaning/type/enum values/compiler behavior/validation behavior.

title: Visual graph annotation/highlight standard
notes: Useful companion utility extension; not language core.
